title: YOLO Signals Manual Ground Truth
subtitle: Manual YOLO bounding boxes for TurtleBot signal detection
description: Manual YOLO detection dataset built from turtlebot/labels-gt. Contains images and YOLO txt labels for 4 classes: left-arrow, right-arrow, stop-signal, and meta. Current packaged state: 458 labeled images out of 540 source images, with 366 train images and 92 validation images.
